name: Cheesecake Germania
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chocolate wafer crumbs, sugar, and melted margarine in a bowl. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 325°F for 10 minutes.
2. In another bowl, combine the softened cream cheese, sugar, cocoa, and vanilla. Mix on medium speed until well blended. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Pour the mixture over the crust.
3. Place the cheesecake in an oven preheated to 350°F and bake for 35 minutes. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan before removing it. Allow the cheesecake to cool completely before refrigerating.
4. In a small saucepan, combine evaporated milk, sugar, margarine, beaten egg, and vanilla. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until thickened. Stir in chopped pecans and flaked coconut. Let the topping mixture cool before spreading it on the chilled cheesecake.
